ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the city */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases in the city */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the district */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases in the district */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_districts" (
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-district */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the sub-district is located */,
  "sub_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-district */,
  "sub_district_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sub-district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the sub-district */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the sub-district */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases in the sub-district */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the sub-district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_districts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-district where the case data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases (positive cases - recovered cases - deaths) */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Rate of testing per 1000 people in the sub-district */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination per 1000 people in the sub-district */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalization per 1000 people in the sub-district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_sub_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_district_id") REFERENCES sub_districts ("sub_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_data ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-district where the hospital is located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients currently in the hospital */,
  "covid_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients with confirmed or suspected Covid-19 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_sub_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_district_id") REFERENCES sub_districts ("sub_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-district where the vaccination data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "third_dose" INTEGER /* Number of third doses administered */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the sub-district */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "booster_doses" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_sub_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_district_id") REFERENCES sub_districts ("sub_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "trace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact tracing record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being traced */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of contact */,
  "contact_location" TEXT /* Location of contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the contact to the case (e.g., family, friend, colleague) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the contact (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_data ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation record */,
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-district where the resource is allocated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., masks, vaccines, testing kits) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who allocated the resource */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the allocated resources */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the resources (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_sub_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_district_id") REFERENCES sub_districts ("sub_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health intervention */,
  "sub_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-district where the intervention is conducted */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, vaccination drive, awareness campaign) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the intervention (e.g., reduced cases, increased vaccination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_interventions_sub_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_district_id") REFERENCES sub_districts ("sub_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., hospital, laboratory, public health department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Validity of the data (e.g., verified, pending verification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_sources_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_data ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
